critical_issues.title: QA-03 acceptance criteria are not validated with completed evidence in this PR
critical_issues.action: Checklist remains an execution artifact that must be completed in a staging run with Azure access; repository-only changes cannot produce truthful staging evidence.

critical_issues.title: No executable QA-03 guardrail was added for continuous verification
critical_issues.action: Added a concrete staging validation procedure section, but did not add new executable integration assertions because this issue output is a manual sign-off artifact and staging telemetry checks require environment-specific credentials/configuration.

suggestions.title: Add automated telemetry assertions for required events/metric
suggestions.action: Added explicit App Insights and Metrics Explorer validation query steps in the checklist procedure for repeatable execution.

suggestions.title: Record concrete run identifiers in artifacts
suggestions.action: Run-specific identifiers cannot be populated without executing a live staging validation run.
